/about.title: About AnglerPass | The Private Water Fly Fishing Platform | AnglerPass
/about.description: AnglerPass is the only platform that connects fly anglers, fly fishing clubs, and private landowners in a single marketplace for private water access.

/team.description: Meet the team behind AnglerPass — the platform modernizing private fly fishing access for landowners, clubs, and anglers.
